dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal translated using returns (5% threshold = ±0.05 decimal scale) to detect zigzag peaks and troughs. Entry conditions detect 5% moves from recent extremes (prev_high for peaks, prev_low for troughs). Exit conditions trigger on reversal through identified extremes. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to allow both long and short signals. Pattern scale and detection lag tolerance parameters incorporated into hold_days_max and stop_loss_pct. Note: Explicit head-and-shoulders pattern detection is not available in allowed indicators; this rule focuses on the zigzag threshold mechanism.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal translated using returns (5% threshold = ±0.05 decimal scale) to detect zigzag peaks and troughs. source_rule_text: A trader should calibrate the threshold percentage of a zigzag filter to detect peaks and troughs at a scale appropriate to the pattern size being analyzed, as different thresholds reveal patterns of different magnitudes.
